text:
On 02/14/12 08:50, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of audio/decibel-audio-player,
>
> Please note that PR ports/165135 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/165135
>
Looks good, apologies on the late response.
